name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo N40750 Green] For the Damierlicious Special Edition, the Victorine wallet is crafted in Damier canvas with sweet and soft tones. It brings a fresh and gentle vibe to this compact wallet, featuring an envelope-style flap with a gold-engraved button closure. Inside, there are pockets for bills and coins, as well as six card slots. Size: 12x9.5x1.5cm
